all.en: Last Friday, my classmates and I decided to take a short trip to Kenting.
all.zh: 上週五，我和同學們決定到墾丁來個小旅行。

all.en: We made the reservation online and chose a small bed-and-breakfast near the beach.
all.zh: 我們在網路上訂房，選了一間靠近海邊的小型民宿。

all.en: The high-speed train took us to Kaohsiung in less than two hours.
all.zh: 高鐵不到兩小時就把我們載到了高雄。

all.en: From there, we rented a car and drove south along the beautiful coast.
all.zh: 我們從那裡租了車，沿著美麗的海岸線一路往南開。

all.en: When we arrived, the owner of the B&B welcomed us with a cup of fresh fruit tea.
all.zh: 我們抵達時，民宿老闆用一杯新鮮水果茶歡迎我們。

all.en: In the afternoon, we went swimming and tried surfing for the first time.
all.zh: 下午我們去游泳，並且第一次嘗試衝浪。

all.en: The waves were stronger than I expected, but our instructor was very patient.
all.zh: 海浪比我預期的還要強勁，不過我們的教練非常有耐心。

all.en: For dinner, we walked to the famous night market to taste the local seafood.
all.zh: 晚餐我們走到有名的夜市去品嚐當地的海鮮。

all.en: I bought some small souvenirs for my parents and younger sister.
all.zh: 我買了一些小紀念品送給爸媽和妹妹。

all.en: On the second day, we visited the lighthouse and took many photos at sunrise.
all.zh: 第二天，我們參觀燈塔，並在日出時拍了許多照片。

all.en: Although the trip was short, it was the most relaxing weekend I have had this year.
all.zh: 雖然旅程很短，這卻是我今年最放鬆的一個週末。

all.en: We have already started planning our next trip to Hualien during the winter vacation.
all.zh: 我們已經開始計畫寒假時去花蓮的下一趟旅行。

all.en: During the long ride back, we listened to music and talked about our favorite moments.
all.zh: 漫長的回程路上，我們一邊聽音樂，一邊聊著最喜歡的時刻。

all.en: My classmate Anna kept showing everyone the sunset photos she had taken at the lighthouse.
all.zh: 同學安娜不停把她在燈塔拍的夕陽照片秀給大家看。

all.en: When I finally got home, my mother was waiting with a hot bowl of soup.
all.zh: 我終於回到家時，媽媽端著一碗熱湯在等我。

all.en: My little sister was so excited that she opened her souvenir before I even sat down.
all.zh: 我妹妹興奮到我都還沒坐下就把紀念品拆開了。

all.en: The next morning, I uploaded the photos to a shared album so everyone could download them.
all.zh: 隔天早上，我把照片上傳到共用相簿，這樣大家都能下載。

all.en: My teacher noticed my tanned skin in class and joked that I clearly had a good vacation.
all.zh: 上課時老師注意到我曬黑的皮膚，開玩笑說我顯然玩得很開心。

all.en: That afternoon, our group started a chat to plan the winter trip to Hualien.
all.zh: 那天下午，我們小組建了聊天群組來規劃花蓮的冬季旅行。

all.en: We decided that this time we would try cycling along the famous coastal bike path.
all.zh: 我們決定這次要嘗試沿著有名的海岸自行車道騎車。

all.en: I started saving part of my allowance every week to pay for the train tickets.
all.zh: 我開始每週存一部分零用錢來支付火車票。

all.en: Looking back at the Kenting trip, I realized that good friends make every place feel special.
all.zh: 回想墾丁這趟旅行，我體會到好朋友能讓每個地方都變得特別。
